title: Register for monday Evolve Summit in Dallas!

posts.author: bridget.monday (Bridget P.)
posts.cookedHtml:
We invite you to an exclusive day of learning, networking, and peer inspiration. Join industry leaders and fellow monday.com customers for a day of educational sessions, peer-learning, and networking. Strengthen your skillset for the new world of work. Whether you’re new to monday.com or are a seasoned veteran — flex new skills with monday.com masterclasses while networking with industry peers and thought leaders.
Register here!
